scenes.text: Mi papá solía llevarnos de paseo todos los domingos.
scenes.image_prompt: A modest family sedan driving down a sunlit suburban road on a lazy Sunday afternoon, golden hour light, tree-lined street with dappled shadows, warm nostalgic cinematic look, 4k

scenes.text: Sin destino, sin GPS, ni siquiera un plan. Solo las ventanillas abajo y la radio suave.
scenes.image_prompt: Interior shot of a car from the backseat, windows rolled down, breeze moving through, dad's hands on the steering wheel, sunlight streaming in, warm tones, cinematic shallow depth of field, 4k

scenes.text: No solía hablar mucho en casa. Pero en el coche, algo se abría.
scenes.image_prompt: Profile shot of a middle-aged father driving, soft afternoon light on his face, thoughtful expression, slight smile, blurred road through windshield, cinematic portrait, 4k

scenes.text: Nos habló de su infancia, de los errores que cometió, de cosas que nunca terminó.
scenes.image_prompt: A winding country road stretching into the distance, seen through a car windshield, late afternoon golden light, open fields on both sides, nostalgic and reflective mood, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: Ese impulso nunca estaba destinado a algún lugar. Era la única manera que conocía para decir lo que sentía.
scenes.image_prompt: Wide shot of a car parked at a scenic overlook at sunset, father and child silhouettes sitting on the hood, warm orange and purple sky, deeply emotional cinematic composition, 4k
